__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: first-discharge specific capacity at 0.1C in 1M LiPF6 EC/DMC, room T, half-cell vs Li/Li+
model_caveat: CHGNet predicts DFT-level formation energies + magnetic moments + per-atom forces. Capacity is derived from delta-Li-content phase-energy convex hull in the Li-Mn-Nb-Ti-O space. The 290 mAh/g value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: lab-cell first-discharge capacities from Lee/Ceder 2014 + Yabuuchi 2015 + Wolverton DRX corpus for Li-rich Mn-based DRX cathodes. CHGNet's CONVEX-HULL OUTPUT could in principle generate the same number from the formation-energy landscape.
proxy_source: Lee, Urban, Li, Su, Hautier, Ceder 2014 Nat. Mater. 13:343 (Li-Mn-Nb DRX 295 mAh/g first discharge) + Yabuuchi 2015 Proc. Natl. Acad. Sci. 112:7650 (Li-Mn-Ti DRX 280-300 mAh/g) + Manthiram 2020 review for oxygen-redox context
falsifier_text: capacity < 280 mAh/g @ 0.1C OR avg V < 3.4 V vs Li/Li+ in 1M LiPF6 EC/DMC → FAIL

arxiv_anchor_refresh_2026_05_14.verdict_unchanged: falsifier_relation remains PASS — 290 mAh/g proxy supported by Feb 2026 HE-DRX 256.3 mAh/g + Wolverton SRO probability mapping

unproven_markers_preserved: DRX oxygen-loss HARD_WALL on 1st cycle (Lee 2014 + Manthiram 2020)
Mn dissolution UNVERIFIED at extended cycling above 4.4 V
honesty_caveats: Capacity-only PASS does NOT close the candidate — F-BAT-CATH-1 has an AND-of-OR falsifier: capacity < 280 mAh/g OR avg V < 3.4 V either FAILS. Average voltage for Li-Mn-Nb-Ti DRX is typically ~ 3.3-3.5 V vs Li/Li+ (Lee 2014 fig. 3), MARGINAL on the V floor. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED. Cell engineering → hexa-energy per CROSS_LINK §3.3.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms; vendor authority Wolverton (Northwestern) + CATL / BYD commodity baseline (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
